# mistershell Provider

Terraform provider for managing MisterShell resources (locations, network resources, credentials).



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `api_key` (String, Sensitive) MisterShell API key (yami_ prefixed). Can also be set with the MISTERSHELL_API_KEY environment variable.
- `insecure` (Boolean) Skip TLS certificate verification. Use for self-signed certificates. Defaults to false.
- `url` (String) MisterShell base URL (e.g. https://mistershell.example.com). Can also be set with the MISTERSHELL_URL environment variable.
